headline: Nvidia (NVDA) Faces Fresh Rack Server Pressure As AMD Launches Helios
summary: AMD has launched its Helios AI rack server platform, directly targeting the same rack-scale AI infrastructure segment as NVIDIA. The new AMD platform is being rolled out with agreements from major industry players that intend to deploy Helios in upcoming AI data center builds. This development introduces a fresh competitive threat to NVIDIA's AI rack systems, with potential implications for how large customers allocate future AI infrastructure spending. NVIDIA, traded as NasdaqGS:NVDA, now...
